creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text: Thank you for the report. Can you clarify what previous FreeBSD version you rebased from? Specifically, I'd like to know if you were previously based on stable/10, in which case this would be a regression in ELF Tool Chain readelf compared to GNU binutils. If it's a rebase from an earlier stable/11 then it's a regression within ELF Tool Chain.
